[**ESE6150: RoboRacer Autonomous Racing Cars**](/ESE6150-Website/ "ESE6150: RoboRacer Autonomous Racing Cars / Spring 2024 - University of Pennsylvania")   
Spring 2024  
---|---  
  
# Lectures

You can download the lectures here. We will try to upload lectures prior to their corresponding classes.

  * ![](/ESE6150-Website/static_files/presentations/lec1.png)

Introduction to Autonomous Driving: Perception, Planning Control  
**tl;dr:** Course introduction and logistics. Brief introduction to topics covered.   
**[[slides](
    
      https://docs.google.com/presentation/d/1zfzzjVTbXNIZ75BFtGEwQBJRHlY95VKkFQjJhYfznpI 
     "Download slides")] **   


**Suggested Readings:** [Tutorial 1: Intorduction to ROS2](https://docs.google.com/presentation/d/1nzzvHQuBJAqdjlPDUl0l2_rU-MAu8jctu1Gt66vlHHM).

  * ![](/ESE6150-Website/static_files/presentations/lec2.png)

Automatic Emergency Braking  
**tl;dr:** Introduction to AEB and range sensors.   
**[[slides](
    
      https://docs.google.com/presentation/d/1HQSLPLE-fZ3EN-9PyqMd7-ti7JSLKL7qlrouGFEprU0 
     "Download slides")] **   


**Suggested Readings:** [Tutorial 2: Intorduction to the RoboRacer Simulator](https://github.com/f1tenth/f1tenth_gym_ros).

  * ![](/ESE6150-Website/static_files/presentations/lec3.png)

Rigid Body Transformations  
**tl;dr:** Frames of references and rigid body transformations. Using tf2_ros.   
**[[slides](
    
      https://docs.google.com/presentation/d/1re3qE2tk4VAsoHSa-On6EgLir1H_FyGoQlvOtHHjD18 
     "Download slides")] **   


**Suggested Readings:** [Tutorial 3: ROS2 and TF2](https://docs.google.com/presentation/u/0/d/1GjGW39ufWI3bDcy7rMcaRYin_11soNIzCh2CtzO7580).

  * ![](/ESE6150-Website/static_files/presentations/lec4.png)

PID for Wall Following  
**tl;dr:** Introduction to reference tracking using PID control.   
**[[slides](
    
      https://docs.google.com/presentation/d/1H6l5HvkefJPAyuRftv1JV3KtEk-WnOrcsy0wCVPfayc 
     "Download slides")] **   


**Suggested Readings:** [Tutorial 4: Getting to know the car, odom tuning, battery safety, running containers on the car, remote desktop, network setup](https://docs.google.com/presentation/u/0/d/1WLVRNfqWXB-65bd6PadGsy9ZFXRCPgGrS71hZlTdPh4)

  * ![](/ESE6150-Website/static_files/presentations/lec5.png)

Vehicle States, Dynamics, and Simulation  
**tl;dr:** Dynamics states, single track models, tire models.   
**[[slides](
    
      https://docs.google.com/presentation/u/0/d/1N43WE4SCjZuxWeSoAGpCqs0DI-enU8Ln_RexPaHXmIA 
     "Download slides")] **   


**Suggested Readings:** [Tutorial 4: Getting to know the car, odom tuning, battery safety, running containers on the car, remote desktop, network setup](https://docs.google.com/presentation/u/0/d/1WLVRNfqWXB-65bd6PadGsy9ZFXRCPgGrS71hZlTdPh4)

  * ![](/ESE6150-Website/static_files/presentations/lec6.png)

Follow the Gap: Obstacle Avoidance  
**tl;dr:** Introduction to reactive methods for racing.   
**[[slides](
    
      https://docs.google.com/presentation/d/1icJ0SHz2Q6JybGRywRTIHEpZbuQ_K2lmvEoJ-sYO4C4/edit?usp=sharing 
     "Download slides")] **   


**Suggested Readings:** [Tutorial 4: Getting to know the car, odom tuning, battery safety, running containers on the car, remote desktop, network setup](https://docs.google.com/presentation/u/0/d/1WLVRNfqWXB-65bd6PadGsy9ZFXRCPgGrS71hZlTdPh4)

  * ![](/ESE6150-Website/static_files/presentations/lec7.png)

Filtering  
**tl;dr:** Introduction to state estimation and recursive bayes filters.   
**[[slides](
    
      https://docs.google.com/presentation/d/1B0IlZtPmhF53mwVZndzxrNjBafZgwpddCs7g8lFJcTY 
     "Download slides")] **   


  * ![](/ESE6150-Website/static_files/presentations/lec8.png)

Localization: Particle Filter  
**tl;dr:** Mapping, localization, AMCL and particle filter Tuning.   
**[[slides](
    
      https://docs.google.com/presentation/u/0/d/1EAzm9A7FbAZFmA8l3ZNb2qjY_GqrLP0r-0uYwL0lLfs 
     "Download slides")] **   


  * ![](/ESE6150-Website/static_files/presentations/lec10.png)

Introduction to Graph-based SLAM  
**tl;dr:** Graph SLAM, Probability and Scan Matching, Sparse Pose Adjustment   
**[[slides](
    
      https://docs.google.com/presentation/d/17Ef4lVkHAv2eUZNr8Tb549mbGYpCgCqqtjGaIiFPTlk 
     "Download slides")] **   


**Suggested Readings:** [Tutorial 5: Running slam_toolbox and pf](https://docs.google.com/presentation/u/0/d/1CZBElDbKDDuVu4GpFFRiXm-pnE4lZPBhro3ewxeANX8)

  * ![](/ESE6150-Website/static_files/presentations/lec11.png)

Pure Pursuit  
**tl;dr:** Pure pursuit as a geometric control method.   
**[[slides](
    
      https://docs.google.com/presentation/d/1jpnlQ7ysygTPCi8dmyZjooqzxNXWqMgO31ZhcOlKVOE 
     "Download slides")] **   


  * ![](/ESE6150-Website/static_files/presentations/lec12.png)

Local Planning: RRT, Spline Based Planner  
**tl;dr:** Obstacle avoidance using sampling based planners   
**[[slides](
    
      https://docs.google.com/presentation/d/1pBMGNbNAJH1VNka8KikM2C5qJ_Hc-OxCEaJNGT4tcx0 
     "Download slides")] **   


  * ![](/ESE6150-Website/static_files/presentations/lec14.png)

Optimization & Control I: Optimization Basics and LQR  
**tl;dr:** Introduction to optimization, optimal control and MIMO systems.   
**[[slides](
    
      https://slides.google.com 
     "Download slides")] **   


  * ![](/ESE6150-Website/static_files/presentations/lec14.png)

Optimization & Control II: Optimization Basics and LQR  
**tl;dr:** Introduction to constrained optimal control, MPC formulation and application.   
**[[slides](
    
      https://docs.google.com/presentation/u/0/d/1QBXVAaRjFa0_fBHOmTFo2AHS1nvde_nONzNAGvCgCxM 
     "Download slides")] **   


  * ![](/ESE6150-Website/static_files/presentations/lec15.png)

Classical Perception  
**tl;dr:** Camera basics, Depth Estimation and Visual SLAM.   
**[[slides](
    
      https://docs.google.com/presentation/u/0/d/18ysXvBBA9b6Vm8Zdb4ir8RifWbvAwKjrussUnm-WflY 
     "Download slides")] **   


  * ![](/ESE6150-Website/static_files/presentations/lec1.png)

Final Project Overviews  
**tl;dr:** Final project expectations, logistics, and ideas.   
**[[slides](
    
      https://docs.google.com/presentation/u/0/d/1iFZeSiOVdTTK-UHhK7gO4O89EaZyizbEM_GpwEvGC50 
     "Download slides")] **   


  * ![](/ESE6150-Website/static_files/presentations/lec1.png)

Final Project Overviews  
**tl;dr:** In class discussion on team projects   
**[[slides](
    
      https://docs.google.com/presentation/u/0/d/1iFZeSiOVdTTK-UHhK7gO4O89EaZyizbEM_GpwEvGC50 
     "Download slides")] **   


  * ![](/ESE6150-Website/static_files/presentations/lec16.png)

Introduction to Autonomous Driving: Perception, Planning Control  
**tl;dr:** Deep Learning Basics, Object Detection, and Network Deployment.   
**[[slides](
    
      https://docs.google.com/presentation/u/0/d/1tU_rbXmZUCA294LlQzAlAE8MV3TspGGoO87qxggn9hw 
     "Download slides")] **   


  * ![](/ESE6150-Website/static_files/presentations/lec17.png)

Ethics  
**tl;dr:** In-class discussion on ethics and autonomous vehicles.   
**[[slides](
    
      https://docs.google.com/presentation/d/1TrjrLP9FARX5m6i_-2A0MrhpEriSzyaRjKmOEzJ1-so 
     "Download slides")] **   


**Suggested Readings:** [Tutorial 6: Foxglove visualization for the RoboRacer](https://docs.google.com)

  * ![](/ESE6150-Website/static_files/presentations/lec18.png)

Raceline Optimization  
**tl;dr:** Shortest Path, Minimum Curvature, Minimum Time and evolution strategies.   
**[[slides](
    
      https://docs.google.com/presentation/d/1rudShBR5f63UaBfhXmK2RvD5Za5fkx4i5Pv8px9o-2E 
     "Download slides")] **   


  * ![](/ESE6150-Website/static_files/presentations/lec1.png)

TBA

      https://slides.google.com 
     "Download slides")] **   


**Suggested Readings:** TBA

  * ![](/ESE6150-Website/static_files/presentations/lec19.png)

Reinforcement Learning and Imitation Learning
